name: @aether/agent
description: Aether Agent — verified local file automation for AetherAutomate

scripts.build:win: npx pkg dist/index.js --target node18-win-x64 --output dist/binaries/AetherAgent.exe --compress GZip
scripts.build:mac: npx pkg dist/index.js --target node18-macos-x64 --output dist/binaries/AetherAgent-mac --compress GZip
scripts.build:linux: npx pkg dist/index.js --target node18-linux-x64 --output dist/binaries/aether-agent-linux --compress GZip
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:win && npm run build:mac && npm run build:linux
